ModMetaData.name: Ascension Megacorp
ModMetaData.description:
Ascension Megacorp delivered a high-tech faction experience centered on corporate contracts, financial pressure, and mechanized force projection.
- Adds the new faction United Stellar Armament Company - a profit-driven megacorp. - Adds 5 new mechs, all having it's own role and design. - Adds USAC orbital traders with exclusive stock pools and orbital mech purchasing. - Adds a unique USAC trade economy that uses Bodybags and Credit Bonds as transaction currency. - Adds debt-focused gameplay (including debt-start scenarios), loan/repayment flow, and USAC service. - Adds custom events, including Seal operation and Assault rig raids. - Optional integrations: Biotech, Ideology, and The Deadman's Switch (enables additional integrated content). - Built-in compatibility: Combat Extended.
